risk_signals: External integrations are present and will need interface contracts plus vendor coordination.
Compliance-oriented requirements are present and should be validated early to avoid late rework.
Non-functional scope is substantial, so quality engineering should run in parallel with feature delivery.
4 high-complexity tasks sit on the roadmap and deserve early prototyping.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: CRM and sales operations.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 6 functional task(s) and 4 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 4 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 10 requirements -> 10 atomic tasks across 2 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T006 -> T005 (2 hops, ~8 story points, estimated 5 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Optimize sales analytics: revenue forecasts, conversion rates performance constraints blocks 4 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 6 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 292 estimated hours | FR: 138h | NFR: 154h.
